# jamfschool_dep_device (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School DEP device by serial number.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_dep_device" "example" {
  serial_number = "C02ABC123DEF"
}

output "dep_device_model" {
  value = data.jamfschool_dep_device.example.model
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `serial_number` (String) Serial number of the DEP device.

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) Device color.
- `device_name` (String) Device name.
- `id` (Number) Unique identifier.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID.
- `model` (String) Device model.
- `placeholder_name` (String) Placeholder name.
- `profile_name` (String) DEP profile name.
- `status` (String) DEP status.
- `user_id` (Number) Associated user ID.
